title: Fix rmi to remove intermediate images associated with an image
body:
buildah rmi now removes cached images associated with an image
when the image is removed only if the cached image is not required
by another image.
If an image is a parent and has a name then untag, otherwise return
an error stating the image can't be remoed as it has dependent
child images.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan no one, it is just something we needed to implement to account for the cached images. Without this, the intermediate images will just be lying around in the store after you delete the final image. Did the same in podman, https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/1055.
Looks like you have to break out the functions in rmi.go into multiple functions.
@nalind @rhatdan no matter how much I increase the timeout, the tests still times out. I increased it to 1500s and it still happened. Am I doing something wrong?

:pushpin: Commit 0b90d0a has been approved by `rhatdan`
